instruction: <FLIGHT>Your user id is amelia_davis_8890. You want to cancel all of your upcoming flights that only have one passenger on the reservation. Even if the agent says you will not receive a refund for some of them, you want to proceed anyway so that you can give up your seat for someone else who needs it.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: cancel all of your upcoming flights

hints.segment: that only have one passenger on the reservation
hints.hint: Only cancel the flights where I'm the only passenger on the reservation

hints.segment: proceed anyway even if you will not receive a refund
hints.hint: Cancel them even if I won't get a refund

hints.segment: give up your seat for someone else who needs it
hints.hint: I'm canceling to free up my seat for someone else
